zh.lifeSummary: 當Priscilla K Bird於1716年出生在美國維吉尼亞州時，她的父親William Bird21歲，母親Eliza Horn20歲。她於1731年與Curtis Land III在美國北卡羅來納州結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1771年在美國維吉尼亞州素可素可享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Priscilla K Bird于1716年出生在美国弗吉尼亚州时，她的父亲William Bird21岁，母亲Eliza Horn20岁。她于1731年与Curtis Land III在美国北卡罗来纳州结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1771年在美国弗吉尼亚州素可素可享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bird
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a young or a small and slender person, from Middle English brid, bird, burd (Old English bird, brid, perhaps also byrd) ‘bird, young bird’, also ‘young man, young woman, child’.

Irish: Anglicized form of a number of Irish names erroneously thought to contain the element éan ‘bird’, in particular Ó hÉinigh (see Heagney ), Ó hÉanna (see Heaney ), Ó hÉanacháin (see Heneghan ), and Mac an Déaghanaigh (see McEneaney ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘bird’, as for example German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Vogel , French Loiseau , Czech Ptáček (see Ptacek ) and Pták, Polish Ptak .

variants.name: Kingbird
meanings: Native American (Chippewa; also King Bird): translation into English of the Chippewa personal name Ogimaa-bines(i), meaning literally ‘the bird that is king’ and referring to the mythological bird-like creature thunderbird. See also Bird 4.
History: The progenitor of the large family of the Kingbirds from the Red Lake, MN, was Ogimaa-bines, a musical gifted Chippewa spiritual leader.

variants.name: Byrd
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Bird  .

variants.name: Heaney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Malachy, Nuala, Ronan.

Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÉanna and Ó hÉinne, ‘descendant of Éanna’, a very common personal name of uncertain meaning. It was borne by various early Christian saints, most notably Saint Éanna of Aran. The name has been erroneously understood as containing the element éan ‘bird’ and as a result the surname was sometimes Anglicized as Bird .

variants.name: Blackbird
meanings: Native American (also Black Bird): translation into English of a personal name such as Lakota Sioux Ziŋtkala Sapa, which is composed of ziŋtkala ‘bird’ and sapa ‘black’. See also Bird 4.
English (Durham): nickname for someone with a dark beard, from Middle English blak ‘black’ + berd ‘beard’ (Old English blæc + beard).

variants.name: Burd
meanings: Jewish (from Poland and Ukraine): nickname for a man with a notable beard, from a southern Yiddish pronunciation of Yiddish bord ‘beard’.

variants.name: Burt
meanings: English (southern): variant of   Bird  ,   Bright  , or   Burd  .
German: Middle High German burt ‘that which is due or proper’, therefore a nickname for someone who has fulfilled his obligations properly.
Jewish (from Poland and Ukraine): variant of   Burd  .

variants.name: Hummingbird
meanings: Native American (Cherokee): translation into English of a personal name based on the Cherokee name walela for a hummingbird. See also Bird 4.

variants.name: Heagney
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÉignigh, ‘descendant of Éigneach’, a personal name meaning ‘forceful’. The spelling of the Irish name was often simplified to Ó hÉinigh and then Anglicized as Heaney or ‘translated’ as Bird , the latter because of a perceived similarity to éan ‘bird’.

nameMeanings.name: Priscilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin: from a post-classical Latin personal name, a feminine diminutive of the Roman family name Priscus ‘ancient’. Priscilla was the name of a woman with whom St Paul stayed at Corinth (Acts 18:3), referred to elsewhere as Prisca. The name was in regular use in the late 16th century and enjoyed a modest vogue in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.

en.lifeSummary: When Priscilla K Bird was born in 1716, in Virginia, United States, her father, William Bird, was 21 and her mother, Eliza Horn, was 20. She married Curtis Land III in 1731, in North Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1771, in Sussex, Sussex, Virginia, United States, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Priscilla K Bird est née en 1716, à Virginie, États-Unis, son père, William Bird, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Eliza Horn, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Curtis Land III en 1731, à Caroline du Nord, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1771, à Sussex, Sussex, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Priscilla K Bird 1716 in Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Bird 21 und ihre Mutter Eliza Horn 20. Sie hat 1731 in North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten Curtis Land III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1771 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Sussex, Sussex, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten.

Lei sposato Curtis Land III nel 1731, nel Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Priscilla K Bird(이)가 1716년 미국 버지니아 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bird(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eliza Horn(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1731년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 Curtis Land III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1771년 미국 버지니아 주 수세스 수세스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Priscilla K Bird родилась в 1716 г. в местности Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени William Bird было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Eliza Horn, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Curtis Land III в 1731 г. в местности Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1771 г. в местности суссекс, суссекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 55 лет.
